name: My law firm isn't showing up in AI answers anymore, what happened to our visibility?
description: Switch to GEO: structure content for AI citations with local details and FAQs.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: My law firm isn't showing up in AI answers anymore, what happened to our visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Switch to GEO: structure content for AI citations with local details and FAQs.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **AI search engines now prioritize Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) over traditional SEO, reducing visibility for non-optimized sites.**[2][3] Law firms must adapt by structuring content to answer common client questions directly, as AI tools like Perplexity or ChatGPT cite trusted, authoritative sources in summaries.[3][6] **Key factors:** 1. GEO focuses on AI recommendations, not just rankings.[3] 2. Content needs procedural references, local details, and author attribution for EEAT (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness).[3] 3. Outdated SEO ignores how users query AI conversationally.[2] **Update your site with FAQs matching real questions like 'DUI process in Phoenix,' add attorney bios, and link local resources; test with AI tools weekly.**[3][4] Early adopters gain 6X-7X ROI in leads.[2]
